channel.title: LCallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from LCallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: New: Strait of Hormuz Blockade Could Squeeze Russia and China
Ret. 3-Star General Says He's Never Seen Anything Like Epic Fury â We're Now Playing 'Whac-A-Mullah'
Where Are Those Chicom Jets Normally Harassing Taiwan? Does Epic Fury Have the CCP Nervous?
Rep. Mark Harris to Newsmax: 'Swift Confirmation' Likely for Mullin
item.description: Rep. Mark Harris, R-N.C., praised President Donald Trump's decision to nominate Sen. Markwayne Mullin, R-Okla., to lead the Department of Homeland Sec...

item.title: UPDATE: Test Results Are In for Las Vegas 'Bio-Lab' Investigation
Trump Orders Crackdown on Foreign Cyber Scam Networks
item.description: President Donald Trump on Friday signed an executive order that seeks to crack down on cybercrime, fraud, and online schemes that federal officials sa...

item.title: Rep. Harrigan to Newsmax: Iran Conflict Must Stay Limited
item.description: Rep. Pat Harrigan, R-N.C., said Friday on Newsmax that the conflict involving Iran must remain limited, warning that sending U.S. troops into another ...

item.title: Obama, Biden, Clintons remember Jesse Jackson in Chicago memorial service
item.description: Rev. Jesse Jackson's memorial service draws former Presidents Barack Obama, Joe Biden and Bill Clinton to Chicago's House of Hope arena on Friday.

item.title: Energy Secretary: Gas Prices Could Fall Within Weeks
item.description: Energy Secretary Chris Wright said Friday that gasoline prices could start falling within weeks even after a sharp run-up tied to the intensifying con...

item.title: Marine veteran vows to stay in North Carolina's US Senate race after violent Capitol arrest
item.description: Marine veteran and Green Party candidate Brian McGinnis remains defiant after a violent removal from a Senate hearing involving Sen. Tim Sheehy.

item.title: Rep. Sheri Biggs to Newsmax: Mullin 'Right Choice' for DHS
item.description: Rep. Sheri Biggs, R-S.C., told Newsmax on Friday that President Donald Trump made the right call in selecting Sen. Markwayne Mullin, R-Okla., to lead ...

item.title: Supreme Court Hands Trump an Immigration Victory
FLASHBACK: Dem Senate nominee called illegal aliens 'constituents,' gave advice on evading ICE
item.description: Texas Senate candidate James Talarico faces scrutiny over 2019 posts advising undocumented immigrants how to evade ICE detention during Trump's first ...

item.title: Kristi Noem's firing fails to sway Democrats as DHS shutdown drags on
item.description: Democrats maintained their DHS funding blockade over ICE reforms despite Secretary Kristi Noem's ouster, and Sen. Markwayne Mullin, R-Okla., will take...

item.title: US signals readiness to escort tankers through Hormuz as traffic thins but no mission launched
item.description: Trump and Energy Secretary Chris Wright signal the U.S. may escort tankers through the Strait of Hormuz as shipping traffic drops, though a U.S. offic...
